subject: Sports
title: Michael Jordan: His Airness
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Michael Jordan: His Airness.

hook.text: Cut from his high school varsity team. Became the greatest basketball player who ever lived.

buildup.text: Jordan combined freakish athleticism with an unmatched competitive fire that terrified opponents.

discovery.text: Five MVPs, six Finals MVPs, ten scoring titles. His resume has no peer in basketball history.

twist.text: His Nike deal created the Air Jordan brand—now worth more annually than his career earnings.

climax.text: Jordan transcended basketball. He became the most famous athlete on Earth in the 1990s.

punchline.text: Cut from his school team. Became the greatest of all time.

quiz.question: How many NBA scoring titles did Michael Jordan win?
